concerns.text: FR-004a (sensitivity analysis) is not listed in any User Story's Anchored Requirements, leaving this functional requirement orphaned.

FR-004 defines absolute p‑value difference > 0.05 and relative effect‑size difference > 5 % as inconsistency thresholds without providing empirical or theoretical justification, and it does not reference the required sensitivity analysis, contradicting the idea’s emphasis on rigorous statistical validation.
